note: Local production-library reference baselines measured on this exact machine. Only locally available reference stacks are recorded here; unsupported kernels are marked unavailable instead of estimated.

schema.library: (optional) local reference stack used by this bench, e.g. cuBLAS
schema.match: (optional) substring of the bench-output line that holds this reference value
schema.project_kernel: (required for comparisons) path to the project-kernel baseline entry in docs/baselines.json
schema.project_config: (required for comparisons) config key in docs/baselines.json to compare against
schema.label: (optional) human-readable row label for compare_reference.R output
schema.peak: (optional) hardware peak for this workload's precision class, in the same unit as the stored metric

unsupported.label: Flash Attention seq=1024 b=8 h=8 d=64
unsupported.reason: Installed cuDNN headers on this machine do not expose the graph-based SDPA frontend used for a direct local attention reference, so this row remains unmeasured locally.

unsupported.label: GroupNorm SD 320ch
unsupported.reason: No direct local cuDNN GroupNorm harness is implemented yet, so this row remains unmeasured locally.

1_64_64_320_320.label: Conv2d implicit GEMM 1x64x64x320x320
1_64_64_320_320.note: Median of repeated local cuDNN runs clusters around ~16.9 TFLOPS, but first invocation from an idle laptop state can dip into the mid-14 TFLOPS range; use a wider tolerance to avoid false regressions.
